sigWerErrors.reason: The phrase 'tekrar söyleyeceğim Anna.' (I will say it again, Anna) is replaced with 'tekrar söylüyorum anlat,' (I am saying it again, explain), which changes both the addressee (Anna) and the action (from 'I will say' to 'I am saying, explain'). This alters the meaning and intent of the sentence, making it a significant error.
